name: Linea VR
short_description: Remastered VR-version of Linea, the Game! The goal is to survive for more than 60 seconds on each level, dodging platforms and objects, listening to bitpop soundtracks.
detailed_description:
Meet remastered VR-version of Linea, the Game!

The goal of the game is to survive for more than 60 seconds on each level, dodging platforms and objects, listening to bitpop soundtracks. Eight levels, online-records and achievements are waiting for you.

Features:

  • Challenging gameplay, aimed at reaction
  • Eight unique levels, each with its difficulty, design and music
  • 25 achievements, 8 of them are hidden
  • Online leaderboards

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Russian
*languages with full audio support
